acceptanceCriteria: Stale board snapshots are visible as deferred state
Deferred state cannot promote or apply outputs
requiredEvidence: Reviewer re-check of #1 and #23 governance anchors
blockedReasons: Snapshot was recorded before the latest merged scope contract

guardrails: Stale state is display evidence only
Task board does not execute work or spawn agents
boundary: Stale fixture board only; it does not execute work, refresh itself, spawn agents, or mutate trusted state.
